title: orthanthella lanceolata
intro: Orthanthella lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Orthanthella lanceolata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which may be used to support overall health and well-being.
